name: cipp-mcp
description: First single-binary CLI for CIPP — offline SQLite store, fleet posture analytics, and cross-tenant fan-out no other CIPP tool has.

cipp_api_key.title: CIPP bearer token
cipp_api_key.description: Azure AD bearer JWT for your self-hosted CIPP instance. Obtained via OAuth2 client-credentials against login.microsoftonline.com; 'auth login' performs the exchange and caches it. CIPP_API_KEY accepts a static bearer token.
